name: each emitted rule carries the ADR-0008 4-axis applies_to tag populated by classify-rule.sh Stage 2 (linguist_aliases | iac_dialects | k8s_gvks | purl_uses)
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r11-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Prefer const over let in TypeScript

All TypeScript variable declarations MUST prefer const unless reassignment is required.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml </dev/null; python3 -c 'import re; t = open("'$OUT'/out/typescript/r11-src.yaml").read(); m = re.search(r"applies_to:\s*\n\s*linguist_aliases:\s*\n\s*- typescript", t); exit(0 if m else 1)' && echo emitted-rules-carry-4-axis-tag 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
